RegLoan Bank — Income / Bank Statement Verification Document VER-0006 Page 5 of 5 Statement of Account — continued Date Description Debit ($) Credit ($) Balance ($) 16/06/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 257 - 2,336 02/12/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 146 1,242 3,432 19/02/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - 2,148 5,580 25/06/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - - 5,580 24/09/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 728 - 4,852 11/02/2025 UTILITY BILL - 2,108 6,960 09/07/2025 UTILITY BILL 149 - 6,811 21/02/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 88 - 6,723 01/08/2025 UTILITY BILL 474 - 6,249 09/01/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - - 6,249 10/07/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 237 1,281 7,293 14/05/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 27 1,812 9,078 08/02/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 878 404 8,604 07/09/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - 1,480 10,084 11/03/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 36 1,167 11,215 27/02/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 736 205 10,684 14/07/2025 UTILITY BILL - - 10,684 21/04/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 338 528 10,874
